primary_tagline: A killer AI-powered web suite: spin sharper sites, ship smarter systems.
secondary_descriptor: An AI-powered suite of web tools to die for.
seo_description: 187WEB is a killer AI-powered web suite for building sharper sites and shipping smarter systems with AI-assisted skills for repos, design, docs, launch, research, SEO, revenue, testing, accessibility, versioning, and publishing.
usage_rules: Use 187WEB as the canonical brand everywhere.
Do not use 187SUITE as the main product name.
Use suite only as a descriptor, not the product identity.
Use 187WEB in all caps with no space.
Marketing copy may use killer, sharper, spin, ship, suite, and tools to die for.
Operational skill prompts should remain clean: standalone-first, routed workflow, assist, handoff, scope, report, publish, sync.
rule: Use 187WEB as the canonical brand. Use suite only as a descriptor.
